name: DeepMind
interviewFormat: Research-track: coding screen, technical interview, research presentation, team interviews. Engineering-track: coding, systems design, ML depth, behavioral
questionPatterns: explain reinforcement learning and policy gradient methods
walk me through a research paper you found interesting recently
design a distributed training system for large neural networks
how do you approach a problem where existing methods don't work
describe a research contribution you are most proud of and its limitations
redFlags: inability to communicate complex ideas clearly
